channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: iPhone owners are blaming a ‘silent alarm’ problem for costing them jobs — but a fix is finally coming in iOS 27
item.description: Some iPhone users say their alarms are going off silently, leading to them losing their jobs.

item.title: Puces : les Pays-Bas tentent de bloquer une loi américaine qui menace les ventes d’ASML en Chine
item.description: Les Pays-Bas ont envoyé leur ministre du Commerce à Washington pour freiner une loi qui priverait ASML d'une partie de son marché chinois. Le fabricant de machines à puces, sans qui aucun processeur moderne n'existe, se retrouve coincé entre deux alliés.

item.title: 'I deleted it and it came immediately back': White House staff are having an official app foisted on to their phones and they hate it
item.description: The controversial White House app is a compulsory install for a lot of federal workers, who aren't best pleased.

item.title: Multiple malicious OpenClaw skills found online - including two macOS infostealers
item.description: Criminals found yet another marketplace to infect and use as a launchpad for malware delivery.

item.title: GTA 6 au meilleur prix : déjà 20 euros de moins, les offres de précommande sont là
item.description: Grand Theft Auto VI est sans conteste le jeu le plus attendu de la décennie, et l'attente s'apprête à devenir très concrète. Rockstar Games a officialisé la nouvelle : les précommandes sont ouvertes. Découvrez les meilleures offres pour réserver votre voyage à Vice City au meilleur prix.

item.title: OpenClaw powers $99 mini PC but it's an AI agentic trap wrapped in Windows 11, delivered with a CPU from 2011 - choose a refurbished PC instead
item.description: It's not exactly a deal when you look closely at the details

item.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
item.description: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.

item.title: Google will open the Play Store to outside billing on June 30
item.description: Google will allow developers to offer alternative billing in the US, the UK and Europe starting on June 30.

item.title: Ford had to hire back former engineers to fix mistakes made by its automated systems
item.description: To celebrate its new status as No. 1 in JD Power's initial quality ranking among mainstream automakers, Ford is opening up about the challenges it has faced in recent years, especially around its reliance on automated systems in production and design. It turns out that those automated systems were not as robust as previously assumed, […]

item.title: Vol d’iPhone : Apple dévoile 3 erreurs à ne surtout pas faire
item.description: Alors que l’été a commencé, Apple a enrichi sa page d’assistance consacrée au vol d’un iPhone avec de nouveaux conseils. Voici trois réflexes à adopter si vous êtes confronté à une telle mésaventure.

item.title: From blocking out plane noise to keeping up with your LED light-therapy routine, I've handpicked 15 beauty tech deals for your next holiday
item.description: From Nanoleaf's light-therapy wand to the Oura Ring 4, here are the beauty tech deals worth making room for in your suitcase.

item.title: This super-compact power bank has saved my bacon more times than I'd care to admit — and it just hit an ultra-cheap price for Prime Day
item.description: I use the Anker Nano 10K 45W Power Bank almost every day, and it's just hit an unbelievably low price for Prime Day.

item.title: Thousands Feared Dead After Venezuela Struck by Strongest Earthquake in Over 125 Years
item.description: The country's interim leader declared a state of emergency on Wednesday following shocks measuring 7.5 magnitude after two quakes hit in less than a minute.

item.title: Tom Hanks calls AI replacing him 'a scary thought' — and Hollywood should probably listen
item.description: Tom Hanks' warning that AI replacing him is "a scary thought" highlights the debate over AI and filmmaking

item.title: Test de débit et Speedtest : testez votre vitesse internet et comprenez les résultats
item.description: Un speedtest prend trente secondes. Comprendre ce que les chiffres veulent dire, et quoi en faire ensuite, c'est tout l'enjeu. Lancez le test de débit ci-dessous, on déchiffre les résultats juste après.

item.title: Amazon beats Currys on the Asus Zenbook, the 'fabulously thin' MacBook Air rival for work and study — with double the storage at a much lower price in the Prime Day sale
item.description: It's a price war that Amazon's winning right now on this business and back-to-school Zenbook.

item.title: Get Up to 36% Off With the Best Prime Day Kindle Deals (2026): Paperwhite, Colorsoft, Kids
item.description: There’s no better time to get a Kindle than during Amazon's own sale event.

item.title: Get Up to 43% Off With the Best Prime Day TV Deals Plus Streaming Devices (2026)
item.description: These are the hottest Prime Day deals on our favorite TVs and streaming devices.

item.title: I've spent several weeks with the pricey Kindle Scribe Colorsoft, but I'd be better off with a Kindle Paperwhite and an 11-inch iPad — and right now, that's a cheaper combination
item.description: Sure, the Kindle Scribe Colorsoft sounds great on E Paper, but right now you can get a more powerful, better screen in the 11-inch iPad and a more portable Kindle Paperwhite for less

item.title: Best Bluetooth Speakers (2026): JBL, Sonos, Bose, and More
item.description: Discover the best Bluetooth speakers of all shapes and sizes, from waterproof clip-ons to a massive boom box.

item.title: Big Tech slapped with $3.5bn in fines for using your personal data to train AI — and 'it could be only the beginning,' warns Surfshark
item.description: Surfshark found that 9 out of 10 AI-related fines concern the unlawful use of personal data. But the enforceability of privacy protections remains a key challenge.

item.title: I Found The Best Amazon Prime Day Headphone Deals (2026)
item.description: From AirPods to on-ears, we’ve tested hundreds of pairs of headphones. Here are the best deals from Amazon’s biggest sale event.

item.title: Le nouveau Xiaomi 17T Pro perd déjà 150 € de son prix durant le Prime Day d’Amazon
item.description: Le Xiaomi 17T Pro se démarque avec une dalle lumineuse, mais aussi un jeu de capteurs photo promettant des clichés détaillés même la nuit. Actuellement, il est disponible pour 753 euros.

item.title: I use my Technics ANC earbuds every day because they're still the only buds to offer triple-device multipoint and now, they're cheaper than ever
item.description: This is the best price I've ever seen on my sensational beloved Technics earbuds and because I use them ever day, I know they’re worth it

item.title: Quiet fans are selling like hot cakes, but these 5 Prime Day deals are all still in stock, and will keep you cool and comfortable at night
item.description: Fans are selling fast in the Amazon Prime Day sale, but there are still great deals to be found on whisper-quiet coolers from reputable brands.

item.title: The PS5 homepage, PS Store, and PS App have all been updated with a new GTA 6 UI as pre-orders begin
item.description: Sony has gone full Grand Theft Auto 6 marketing mode as pre-orders for the most anticipated game of all time officially begin.

item.title: I’ve spent years testing headphones and headsets — if you’re looking for the absolute best gaming audio upgrade you can buy this Prime Day, these are the features you need to consider
item.description: I’ve bought a lot of gaming headsets and headphones over the years. Here’s my best advice on which can offer stunning gaming sound and immersive features.

item.title: The most transformational investment in fragile nations isn’t what you think
item.description: It doesn’t involve roads, ports or security forces. It involves 4-year-olds. In an era of shrinking aid budgets and multiplying conflicts, every dollar spent on humanitarian aid must work harder than ever. As the Ebola crisis shows, aid cuts can bring disaster, but the question is not just how much the world spends. It’s whether resources are being directed towards investments that address crisis and generate lasting economic and social returns. ...

item.title: The 23 Best Amazon Prime Day Deals Under $30 We've Found (2026)
item.description: Everything is expensive. Treat yourself to one of these WIRED-tested and -approved Prime Day picks under $30.

item.title: Don't be tempted by the lowest-ever Nintendo Switch Prime Day discount, I'm a gaming editor and the Switch 2 is still the better buy right now
item.description: Why you should avoid the original Switch and pick the Switch 2 this Prime Day.

item.title: Currys is a goldmine for back-to-school and business laptop deals from Asus, HP, and Lenovo — but there's one model you need to avoid
item.description: I found 4 work and study laptops that are actually worth buying and no, they're not on Amazon for Prime Day

item.title: Prime Day isnt over yet: We found the 110+ best deals on Apple, Sony, Kindle, and Lego favorites
item.description: Amazon's summer sale is live. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: Score the Lego Technic Yamaha MT-10 SP for a new low price on Prime Day — save $72
item.description: As of June 25, the Lego Technic Yamaha MT-10 SP has dropped to a new low price at Amazon of $167.99 for Prime Day. This is 30% off its list price of $239.99.

item.title: Mémoire vive : l’espoir d’une baisse des prix avant 2030 vient de mourir
item.description: Micron vient de signer 16 contrats pluriannuels à prix plancher avec ses clients les plus importants, qui courent jusqu'en 2030. La pénurie de RAM n'est plus seulement conjoncturelle : elle est désormais contractuellement garantie.

item.title: We found 10+ Prime Day deals on MicroSD and portable SSDs: How to beat RAMageddon
item.description: With RAMageddon, prices are going way up. But these Prime Day deals keep prices low on portable SSDs and microSDs from Samsung, SanDisk, and Lexar.

item.title: Nothing teases the Phone 4b, launching on July 7
item.description: Nothing will launch the entry-level Phone 4b on July 7.

item.title: I’ve always wanted Apple’s impossibly thin iPhone Air — this 24%-off Prime Day deal might finally convince me
item.description: The iPhone Air is a remarkable iPhone and more affordable than ever thanks to this Amazon Prime Day offer.

item.title: I test vacuums professionally, and I found the 10+ best live deals on Prime Day
item.description: What vacuum should you buy on Prime Day 2026? Our vacuum expert hand-picked these offers — save $100 or more on Shark, Dreame, and Dyson vacuums.

item.title: How to pick HVAC field service management software in 2026
item.description: A look at what separates HVAC field service software that earns its keep from tools that just add another screen to check.

item.title: World Cup Teams Are in a Race for AI Dominance
item.description: This year, FIFA is providing an AI agent that any team can use. Is it enough to level the playing field or will future winners be determined by which team can afford the best tools?

item.title: Democracy has a listening problem. These AI tools could actually help
item.description: Beth Simone Noveck has spent three decades trying to make democracy work online. What she’s learned—and why this moment feels different. When four-year-old Joca, a golden retriever with dark soulful eyes, died on a scorching Brazilian tarmac after an airline’s tragic mistake, the nation’s outrage could have remained just another trending hashtag. But Fernando, a young man in São Paulo, submitted an online legislative proposal for “Joca’s law.” Senators held a hearing, and eventually the Senate and the House passed legislation. ...

item.title: Test de l’Oppo Reno 16 Pro : excellent en photo, mais l’addition est très salée
item.description: Le Oppo Reno 16 Pro mise sur un design compact original, un téléobjectif 3,5x et ColorOS 16, pour séduire un maximum d'utilisateurs. Est-ce suffisant, compte tenu de son prix revu à la hausse ?

item.title: Disney agrees to pay $50 million to YouTube TV and DirecTV subscribers
item.description: YouTube TV and DirecTV Stream customers may be eligible for a cash payout, after Disney agreed to pay $50 million to settle claims that it forced the services to increase their subscription prices. Anyone who was subscribed to YouTube TV or DirecTV Stream between April 1st, 2019, and March 31st, 2026 is eligible to claim […]

item.title: Amazon Prime Day 3 is for the Real Heads, And We're Live-Blogging For Them
item.description: The third day of Amazon Prime Day is for the real heads, and so is our live blog. We'll bring you deals, trends, and commentary until Amazon's annual summer sale finally hangs up its cleats.

item.title: The AI governance gap: why AI is moving faster than the rules meant to control it
item.description: Finance teams are racing to adopt AI but are the controls keeping up?

item.title: The best Prime Day Fitbit deals are live now — Shop the Inspire 3, Charge 6, and more
item.description: We're seeing strong discounts on Fitbits this Prime Day, including the Fitbit Charge 6 and the Versa 4.

item.title: Until June 29, get Claude, Gemini, and ChatGPT for life for $70
item.description: 1min.AI is an AI platform that gives you lifetime access to ChatGPT, Gemini, and more for $70

item.title: This Buy-It-For-Life Coffee Maker Just Won Prime Day
item.description: The Moccamaster Prime Day deal is the best price I've seen this year, on a coffee maker that will probably outlive you.

item.title: 'A scramble for visibility and control, as spend surges': Less than a third of organizations know what their AI software spend is
item.description: Companies don't have much visibility over their AI software, with three in five saying wasted AI spend has risen in the past 12 months.

item.title: Prime Day coffee machine deals are still live — score steep discounts on DeLonghi, Nespresso, and Ninja
item.description: Find the best Prime Day deals on coffee machines at Amazon. Shop De'Longhi, Nespresso, and Ninja.

item.title: The 23 Best Prime Day Deals Under $100 in 2026
item.description: Times are hard in 2026. These Amazon Prime Day deals under $100 on earbuds, Kindles, and other tested products should help make life just a little bit easier.

item.title: The 50+ best Prime Day tech deals, chosen by a tech editor on a tight budget
item.description: Mashable's tech editor found the best Prime Day tech deals of 2026. Get AirPods for $99, Kindles for $85, and save 50% on Bose headphones.

item.title: GTA 6 en précommande à 50 € : voici le seul site où vous pouvez réserver le futur hit de Rockstar au prix le moins cher
item.description: Ça n'a pas dû vous échapper, mais GTA VI est en précommande un peu partout sur Internet. Mais c'est seulement sur Cdiscount que vous pouvez l'avoir pour 50 euros au lieu de 79,99 euros.

item.title: Un visiteur géant arrive : cet astéroïde passera près de la Terre samedi et pourra être observé
item.description: Les comètes peuvent être vues à l'œil nu en approche du Soleil ou de la Terre depuis de grandes distances, mais il en est tout autrement pour des astéroïdes, même s'ils font des centaines de mètres de diamètre. Or, l'ESA vient de faire savoir qu'un de ces astéroïdes va bientôt passer très...

item.title: The 124 best tech deals for day three of Prime Day
item.description: It’s day three of Prime Day, folks. We’re nearly 75 percent of the way through Amazon’s four-day sales event, and unsurprisingly, many deals are still sticking around. There have been all kinds of discounts on things like TVs, smart home gadgets, chargers, headphones, and more. Prime Day typically isn’t as big of a deal as […]

item.title: The best Apple Watch deals of Prime Day — shop the Series 11 at record-low price plus more live deals
item.description: Prime Day runs June 23-26. It's Amazon's biggest sale of the year and we've found deals on Apple Watches. Shop the Series 11 at a new low price.

item.title: The best Prime Day deals on power stations — shop Jackery, Bluetti, DJI, and more
item.description: Portable power stations are on sale at Amazon on Prime Day. Save on Jackery, Bluetti, Anker, DJI, and more.

item.title: GTA VI preorders are live for PS5 and Xbox, starting at $80 with a $100 Ultimate Edition
item.description: As of June 25, "Grand Theft Auto VI" is now available for pre-order on PS5 and Xbox. The base game costs $80, while the Ultimate Edition costs $100.

item.title: Vous avez précommandé GTA 6 ? Attention à l’abonnement payant GTA+
item.description: Rockstar Games offre un mois d'essai à son service GTA+ avec GTA 6, mais le renouvellement est automatique.

item.title: After More Than a Decade of Waiting, ‘GTA VI’ Is Finally Around the Corner
item.description: We’re finally getting Grand Theft Auto VI, poised to be one of the largest gaming releases in history.

item.title: Is this solar e-bike a good idea or sophisticated e-waste?
item.description: I like the idea of a solar-powered electric bike, but I don't think anyone should buy the new Phosgo Go5 - not yet, anyway. This "world's first AI solar e-bike" promises to "eliminate range anxiety," and is sold by a new brand out of China hoping to make a big splash by selling direct-to-consumer through […]

item.title: Zoox : la voiture électrique sans volant d’Amazon s’améliore et vise les 10 000 unités par an… mais l’administration bloque
item.description: Alors que Waymo file devant et que Tesla monte en puissance, Zoox, le taxi autonome d'Amazon, poursuit son développement. L'étrange voiture électrique reçoit plusieurs améliorations, tandis que la production en série s'approche. Reste qu'il manque une approbation fondamentale pour déployer le système à grande échelle.

item.title: Garmin deals are still dropping over Prime Day — save on the only running watch youll ever need
item.description: Find the best Prime Day deals on Garmin fitness trackers at Amazon.
